About Me

Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer · Pune, India

I'm a Senior Software Engineer in DevOps at Autodesk, where I build and maintain cloud infrastructure and MLOps pipelines for enterprise clients including Pixar, Hyundai, and L&T. With 8+ years in the industry, I specialize in bridging the gap between software engineering and infrastructure, enabling teams to ship faster and more reliably.

My experience spans leading DevOps transformations — from containerization and Kubernetes adoption to full GitOps workflows with ArgoCD and Kyverno policy enforcement. Before Autodesk, I built CI/CD pipelines and cloud automation at NICE, contributed to platform engineering at Coupa Software, and honed my quality engineering skills at TIBCO Software.

I hold a Master of Science in Computer Science from Georgia Tech, with coursework focused on cloud computing, distributed systems, and machine learning. This academic foundation complements my hands-on experience in deploying AI/ML workloads in production, building scalable data platforms, and designing infrastructure for high-availability systems.

I'm passionate about automation, infrastructure as code, GitOps, and building developer platforms that improve engineering velocity. When I'm not working on cloud infrastructure, I enjoy exploring agentic AI tooling, contributing to open-source projects, and writing about DevOps patterns and platform engineering practices.

Core Skills

Cloud & Infrastructure

AWS GCP Kubernetes Helm Terraform Pulumi

CI/CD & GitOps

ArgoCD GitHub Actions Jenkins Kyverno Flux

MLOps & Data
